description: Short-circuit the plugin-channel allowlist check that emits 'server X is not on the approved channels allowlist' so --channels passes for any server name.

patches.search_regex: else if\(!A\.dev\)return\{action:"skip",kind:"allowlist",reason:`server \$\{A\.name\} is not on the approved channels allowlist
patches.replace: else if(!1   )return{action:"skip",kind:"allowlist",reason:`server ${A.name} is not on the approved channels allowlist
patches.description: Non-dev (`!A.dev`) plugins are rejected with 'use --dangerously-load-development-channels for local dev' if not on the A
